title: Fix gateway native_sim build Kconfig module loading
description: A narrow verification build for lichen/apps/gateway with board native_sim aborts during Kconfig before C compilation. CONFIG_LICHEN, CONFIG_LICHEN_OSCORE, CONFIG_LICHEN_IPV6, CONFIG_LICHEN_LORA_L2, and CONFIG_LICHEN_L2 are reported as undefined even when retrying west build with ZEPHYR_EXTRA_MODULES pointed at the local lichen module. Investigate module registration/Kconfig loading for gateway native_sim so OSCORE and related subsystem builds can be verified.
close_reason: Fixed LICHEN Zephyr module metadata so ZEPHYR_EXTRA_MODULES=<repo>/lichen sources lichen/zephyr/Kconfig and lichen/zephyr/CMakeLists.txt. Verified gateway native_sim no longer reports undefined CONFIG_LICHEN* symbols; follow-up project-LICHEN-wg5w tracks remaining native_sim dependency warnings.
